## Task
Repair `sv-playbook handoff` so it can generate a continuation context from a
live board. `staleActivePackets` selects numeric event sequences and passes
them to `stringColumn`, which raises `invalid row: column last_note_seq must
be a string` as soon as an active or blocked packet exists.

Read the sequence fields with the numeric row helper. Preserve the existing
stale-note behavior and use the same strict row-boundary validation pattern as
the rest of the store layer.

## RED test
Add a test named exactly: `handoff handles numeric event sequences for active packets`.
Create an active packet with a transition event, run `handoff --force`, and
assert it returns OK and emits the board snapshot. Today it fails with
`invalid row: column last_note_seq must be a string`.

## Stop conditions
Do not weaken stale-note detection, coerce arbitrary rows, or change the
handoff state model. Touch only the handoff command and its tests.

## Evidence
red-test-output, verify-root, final-sha.
